docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-28-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-31-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
